title: Garlic butter
description: This garlic butter is the perfect filling for garlic bread. You could also use it to bake potatoes (add more salt) or just as regular butter for sandwiches.
ingredients:
- 125 g butter
  *room temperature*
- 4-5 cloves garlic
- 4-5 sprigs parsley
- 3-4 tablespoons Parmesan cheese
- freshly ground black pepper
steps:
1. Finely chop parsley.
2. Put butter and parsley into a medium-sized bowl.
3. Press the garlic into the bowl.
4. Grate Parmesan into the bowl.
5. Season with black pepper.
6. Thoroughly mix all the ingredients.
notes: You could keep the garlic butter in the fridge in a sealed container for at least one week.
source: This recipe is based on a [garlic bread recipe](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FkV_fU5GoXM) by Joshua Weissman.
